name: Red Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes into chunks and boil them until they are tender but firm.
2. Hard boil the eggs.
3. Refrigerate both the boiled potatoes and eggs until they have cooled down.
4. Chop the eggs and red onion finely.
5. Combine the potatoes, eggs, chopped onion, and bacon pieces in a large bowl.
6. Pour enough ranch salad dressing over everything until it is well coated to your liking.
7. Mix gently.
8. Chill the salad until ready to serve.
